--name open-webui \

--build-arg https_proxy=$https_proxy

-itd \
--ipc host \
--network vllm_nginx \
--gpus device=0 \

-p 8081:8000 \
--name vllm0 vllm \
--model meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf

-itd \
--ipc host \

--target vllm-openai \
--load .
